microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **recovery validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing observability workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a **rack-level drill program** in 4 months with a 94% recovery rate, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a continuous validation model across cloud-native infrastructure.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring precise technical discovery and stakeholder alignment.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, reducing planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21%, applying an experimental, AI-native mindset to accelerate SE-style technical execution at scale.

Served as the technical subject matter expert across partner integrations with Databricks and NetApp, translating complex distributed-systems requirements into clear product feedback that directly shaped the resilience platform roadmap.

Developed technical collateral and best-practice guides for cross-org resilience workflows, enabling **self-service adoption** across 40+ engineering teams and reducing onboarding time for new partners entering the validation program.

Influenced the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by leading **11+ technical discovery sessions** with Azure service teams, documenting feature gaps and translating DevOps engineer pain points into prioritized engineering requirements.

Accelerated data retrieval and reduced lookup time by **83%** by implementing semantic search standards and migrating internal documentation to an AI-powered retrieval system, directly improving developer and SRE team productivity.

Conducted technical discovery with **20+ service teams** to surface 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths — mirroring the discovery-to-solution workflow core to pre-sales technical engagements.

Engineered a **Power BI observability dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to identify automation gaps, prioritize high-impact initiatives, and quantify value delivery across the cloud infrastructure portfolio.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies including sprint planning and retrospectives, prioritizing the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets** and stabilize the developer intake process across a fast-moving, distributed robotics engineering org.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to better reach DevOps and technical buyer personas.

Improved leadership pricing models by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying and sealing margin leaks that had gone undetected — demonstrating the data-driven, customer-value framing core to SE work.
